title: Daily Memo: New Iranian Supreme Leader, Warnings From Neighbors
author: Geopolitical Futures
summary:
Successor chosen. Mojtaba Khamenei, the son of former Iranian Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, was selected by Iran’s Council of Experts to be the next supreme leader. However, critics alleged that the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps pressured the council and that the process was not transparent, adding that several council members objected to the transfer […]

The post Daily Memo: New Iranian Supreme Leader, Warnings From Neighbors appeared first on Geopolitical Futures.
full_text:
Successor chosen. Mojtaba Khamenei, the son of former Iranian Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, was selected by Iran’s Council of Experts to be the next supreme leader. However, critics alleged that the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps pressured the council and that the process was not transparent, adding that several council members objected to the transfer […]

Geopolitical Futures (GPF) was founded in 2015 by George Friedman, international strategist and author of The Storm Before the Calm and The Next 100 Years.
